title: Can we do location GPS tracking in Monday.com?
excerpt:
Hey, is there any way monday.com allows us to do GPS location tracking ? 
My idea is if a person submits data using form in Monday.com, I want to confirm the location of that person using GPS tracking. 
Thank you!

posts.author: Haidar_Ali (Haidar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, is there any way monday.com allows us to do GPS location tracking ?
My idea is if a person submits data using form in Monday.com, I want to confirm the location of that person using GPS tracking.
Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Haidar_Ali!

Would The Location Column work for you in achieving this? This column is supported in our forms to, so all the user would need to do is input their address and this data will automatically populate your board

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there ,

Don’t know if it helps, but you can also use the GPS of user’s smartphone to update a position (person or item) in your board.

Cheers
